description: Build a token-efficient context assembly system
initial_goal: Design and implement a Python module that assembles structured context blocks from three stores: conscious, subconscious, and whisper. The module must keep total context under 2000 tokens regardless of pipeline depth.

goal_change.new_goal: The token budget has been tightened. Redesign the assembly to stay under 1200 tokens. Preserve all three store types but compress each block further.

acceptance_criteria: Module assembles context under token budget
Unit test for token budget enforcement
